response.original_title: Amor en los Tiempos Inertes (o Ilusión Transitoria)
response.overview: In an online forum, two strangers, Snub and WhitePony, agree to meet in person to fulfill a dark purpose. Armed with a shotgun, they roam the city during the night before facing their mortal fate, but Snub is filled with doubt about whether he can escape what seems inevitable.
response.title: Love in the Time of Dormancy (or Transitory Illusion)
